data.content:
Shipment complete.

- Worktree branch rebased on latest origin/main (which had picked up sibling foolery-988b and foolery-c257 merges).
- Quality gates re-run after rebase: lint, tsc --noEmit, test (311 files / 3109 tests), build — all green.
- Merge commit on origin/main: 91bebcfa (Merge worktree-agent-a2e7fc59f8d388624: consolidate buildAgentLabel into canonical formatter).
- Push origin main: c8bae23c..91bebcfa fast-forward.
